stemHtml: What are the consequences if the pilot neglects to remove the landing gear anti-retract security pin during the external inspections?

options.a: It will prevent to retract the landing gear
options.b: It will be possible to retract the landing gear, but it will cause damage to the airplane.
options.c: It won’t be a problem because the pin blocks the landing gear only if there is weight on wheels.
options.d: The landing gear will retract normally, but the pin will be damaged.
